sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74988" key="o)rqopode/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-ποδέω</orth>, <sense id="n74988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walk straight</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uprightly,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Gal.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
